commits.message:
perf(site): eliminate npm install — pre-built runtime bundle

Build a 1.9MB runtime.mjs at build time containing React + Ink +
rich-js + rich-js-ink pre-bundled. Mount it directly into WebContainer.
Demos import from ./runtime.mjs and run with `node demo.mjs`.

Boot sequence is now:
1. Fetch runtime.mjs + boot WebContainer (parallel)
2. Mount filesystem (runtime + demo file)
3. Spawn shell — ready

No npm install, no package downloads. Should be seconds, not minutes.
